Bug.Title: Application crashes on startup after update
Bug.Description: After the latest update, the application crashes immediately on startup without showing any error message. The issue affects all users on Windows 11.
Bug.StepsToReproduce: 1. Install the latest update v2.3.1 2. Launch the application 3. Observe immediate crash with no error dialog 4. Check Event Viewer for crash logs

Bug.Title: User profile picture not saving correctly
Bug.Description: When a user uploads a new profile picture, the image appears to save successfully but reverts to the previous image after logging out and back in.
Bug.StepsToReproduce: 1. Log in with any account 2. Navigate to Profile Settings 3. Upload a new profile picture 4. Click Save 5. Log out and log back in 6. Observe that the old profile picture is still displayed

Bug.Title: Search results not filtered by date correctly
Bug.Description: The date filter in the search page does not work as expected. When selecting a custom date range, results outside that range are still displayed.
Bug.StepsToReproduce: 1. Navigate to the Search page 2. Enter any search keyword 3. Set a custom date range filter (e.g. 01/01/2024 - 31/01/2024) 4. Click Search 5. Observe results from other dates appearing in the list

Bug.Title: Email notifications sent twice on password reset
Bug.Description: When a user requests a password reset, they receive two identical emails instead of one. This causes confusion and potential security concerns.
Bug.StepsToReproduce: 1. Go to the Login page 2. Click Forgot Password 3. Enter a valid email address 4. Click Send Reset Link 5. Check the inbox and observe two identical reset emails

Bug.Title: Dark mode not applied to modal dialogs
Bug.Description: When dark mode is enabled in settings, most of the application switches correctly but modal dialogs and popup windows still display with a white background.
Bug.StepsToReproduce: 1. Go to Settings 2. Enable Dark Mode 3. Navigate to any page with a modal dialog 4. Open the modal 5. Observe the modal has a white background instead of dark
